mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skill_package ( id, version, name, manifest_checksum, status ) VALUES ( #{packageId}, #{packageVersion}, #{name}, #{manifestChecksum}, 'ACTIVE' )

INSERT INTO capability_source ( id, version, name, source_type, adapter_id, capability_type, scope_type, descriptor_json, checksum, status, raw_content, compiled_manifest_json, compiler_prompt_id, compiler_prompt_version, content_hash, compiled_at ) VALUES ( #{sourceId}, #{sourceVersion}, #{name}, 'SKILL_PACKAGE', 'json-capability-v1', #{capabilityType}, #{scopeType}, CAST(#{descriptorJson} AS JSON), #{descriptorChecksum}, 'ACTIVE', #{rawContent}, CAST(#{compiledManifestJson} AS JSON), #{promptId}, #{promptVersion}, #{contentHash}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) )

INSERT INTO skill_resource ( package_id, package_version, resource_path, resource_type, content_hash, content_text, executable_json ) VALUES ( #{packageId}, #{packageVersion}, #{resourcePath}, #{resourceType}, #{contentHash}, #{contentText}, CASE WHEN #{executableJson} IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CAST(#{executableJson} AS JSON) END )
mapper.select: SELECT id, version, name, source_type AS sourceType, adapter_id AS adapterId, capability_type AS capabilityType, scope_type AS scopeType, CAST(descriptor_json AS CHAR) AS descriptorJson, checksum FROM capability_source WHERE id = #{sourceId} AND version = #{sourceVersion} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO capability_load ( id, task_run_id, loop_run_id, loop_node_id, source_id, source_version, adapter_id, capability_type, scope_root_type, scope_root_id, descriptor_json, status, applied_at ) VALUES ( #{loadId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{sourceId}, #{sourceVersion}, #{adapterId}, #{capabilityType}, #{scopeRootType}, #{scopeRootId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, CAST(#{descriptorJson} AS JSON), 'APPLIED', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) )

INSERT IGNORE INTO capability_load ( id, task_run_id, loop_run_id, loop_node_id, source_id, source_version, adapter_id, capability_type, scope_root_type, scope_root_id, inherited_from_load_id, descriptor_json, status, applied_at ) SELECT UUID_TO_BIN(UUID()), #{taskRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{loopRunId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, source_id, source_version, adapter_id, capability_type, scope_root_type, scope_root_id, id, descriptor_json, 'APPLIED', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6) FROM capability_load WHERE loop_node_id = #{parentLoopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND capability_type = 'POLICY' AND scope_root_type IN ('LOOP_NODE_SUBTREE', 'LOOP_RUN') AND status = 'APPLIED'
mapper.select: SELECT BIN_TO_UUID(load_record.id) AS loadId, load_record.source_id AS sourceId, load_record.source_version AS sourceVersion, source.name, load_record.adapter_id AS adapterId, load_record.capability_type AS capabilityType, load_record.scope_root_type AS scopeRootType, CAST(load_record.descriptor_json AS CHAR) AS descriptorJson, load_record.applied_at AS appliedAt FROM capability_load load_record JOIN capability_source source ON source.id = load_record.source_id AND source.version = load_record.source_version WHERE load_record.loop_node_id = #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND load_record.status = 'APPLIED' ORDER BY load_record.applied_at, load_record.created_at
mapper.update: UPDATE loop_node SET scoped_context_json = CAST(#{scopedContextJson} AS JSON), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{loopNodeId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}
